'''OnePlus Dominate Arena''' is a [[Battlegrounds Mobile India|BGMI]] tournament hosted by [[NODWIN Gaming]] and OnePlus

==About==
===Broadcast Talent===
{{broadcasterCard
|b1=Phoenix
|b2=Shadow |b2link=Shadow (Caster)
|b3=Spardus |b3flag=in |b3name=Shubhank
}}

===Format===
*'''OnePlus Dominate Arena - December''' : ''December 26th - 29th
** 16 teams from Open Qualifiers.
** 4 matchdays.
** 20 matches (5 each day).
